title: China-to-EU Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.target_requirement: Directive 2014/35/EU applies to electrical equipment designed for use within the LVD voltage limits, but power tools covered by Directive 2006/42/EC are excluded from the LVD. Electrical hazards of the tool body are addressed under Machinery Directive Annex I 1.5.1 and transition to Regulation (EU) 2023/1230. The charger, external PSU, or adapter may remain in LVD scope and needs separate LVD conformity evidence.
target_standards: Directive 2006/42/EC (Machinery Directive), Annex I 1.5.1 for tool-body electrical hazards
Directive 2014/35/EU (Low Voltage Directive) for charger, external PSU, or adapter where in scope
Relevant EN charger or power-supply standards [voluntary harmonised standard route]
rows.china_equivalent: China files often use GB 3883 series for tool safety and separate charger standards where applicable. These reports should be mapped to EU essential health and safety requirements and LVD safety objectives rather than treated as automatic CE evidence.
china_standards: China charger safety standards where applicable
rows.gap: The common gap is applying the LVD and EN 62841 to the tool body instead of separating the system boundary. EU documentation should treat the power tool body under machinery safety, then assess the charger, adapter, or external PSU separately for LVD scope and evidence.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation for the power tool body: machinery law, including Directive 2006/42/EC Annex I 1.5.1 and the transition to Regulation (EU) 2023/1230. Mandatory legal obligation for an in-scope charger, external PSU, or adapter: Directive 2014/35/EU; relevant harmonised EN charger or PSU standards remain voluntary presumption routes.
target.zh: 电动工具本体的强制法律义务：机械法规，包括指令 2006/42/EC 附件 I 第 1.5.1 节及向法规 (EU) 2023/1230 的过渡。适用范围内的充电器、外置电源或适配器的强制法律义务：指令 2014/35/EU；相关协调 EN 充电器或电源标准仍为自愿符合性推定路径。
target.zht: 電動工具本體的強制法律義務：機械法規，包括指令 2006/42/EC 附件 I 第 1.5.1 節及向法規 (EU) 2023/1230 的過渡。適用範圍內的充電器、外置電源或適配器的強制法律義務：指令 2014/35/EU；相關協調 EN 充電器或電源標準仍為自願符合性推定路徑。

cn.en: China domestic evidence commonly uses GB 3883 series and charger-specific standards where applicable.
cn.zh: 中国境内证据通常采用 GB 3883 系列及适用的充电器专项标准。
cn.zht: 中國境內證據通常採用 GB 3883 系列及適用的充電器專項標準。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Conditionally non-compliant until the EU file separates the machinery-scope tool body from any LVD-scope charger, adapter, or external PSU and supports each part with appropriate conformity evidence. EN 62841 should not be presented as an LVD standard for the tool body.

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

rows.target_requirement: Directive 2014/30/EU is mandatory for in-scope apparatus, including many motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies. The product must not generate excessive electromagnetic disturbance and must have adequate immunity. Harmonised EMC standards are voluntary routes to presumption of conformity.
target_standards: Relevant harmonised EN EMC standards [voluntary presumption route]
rows.china_equivalent: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and EU declaration wording still need EU-specific review.
china_standards: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable
rows.gap: A frequent EU gap is a report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or worst-case load conditions. The EU technical file should show the exact marketed configuration and justify representative-model coverage.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/30/EU for in-scope apparatus. Harmonised EMC standards are voluntary and should not be described as mandatory.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用设备须符合指令 2014/30/EU。协调 EMC 标准为自愿标准，不应描述为强制要求。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用設備須符合指令 2014/30/EU。協調 EMC 標準為自願標準，不應描述為強制要求。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence, but EU acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and declaration mapping.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据，但欧盟接受性取决于范围、限值、配置和声明映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據，但歐盟接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置和聲明映射。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not EU-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual EU-marketed tool system and is tied to Directive 2014/30/EU in the technical documentation and EU declaration of conformity.

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

rows.requirement: CE Market Access Under EU Machinery Law
rows.target_requirement: Electric and cordless power tools are machinery or related products when placed on the EU market. Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 applies from 20 January 2027; until then, Directive 2006/42/EC remains the main machinery CE framework. The EU legal act is mandatory, while harmonised standards such as EN 62841 are voluntary routes to presumption of conformity.
target_standards: Directive 2006/42/EC on machinery [applies until Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 takes over]
rows.china_equivalent: China power-tool safety files commonly reference the GB 3883 series for hand-held motor-operated electric tools, transportable tools, and lawn and garden machinery. GB 3883 evidence does not replace the EU declaration of conformity, EU technical documentation, risk assessment, or CE marking obligations.
rows.gap: A China domestic safety report is not enough for EU placement. The importer needs an EU declaration of conformity, CE marking, EU-format technical file, machinery risk assessment, instructions, and traceability information mapped to the correct EU legal framework and transition date.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC until 19 January 2027, then Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 from 20 January 2027. EN 62841 is voluntary and is not itself mandatory.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：2027 年 1 月 19 日前适用机械指令 2006/42/EC，2027 年 1 月 20 日起适用法规（EU）2023/1230。EN 62841 为自愿标准，本身不是强制要求。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：2027 年 1 月 19 日前適用機械指令 2006/42/EC，2027 年 1 月 20 日起適用法規（EU）2023/1230。EN 62841 為自願標準，本身不是強制要求。

cn.en: Mandatory China domestic baseline commonly uses GB 3883 series for in-scope power tools.
cn.zh: 中国境内强制基线通常对适用电动工具采用 GB 3883 系列。
cn.zht: 中國境內強制基線通常對適用電動工具採用 GB 3883 系列。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not EU-ready as-is if the product file only contains GB 3883 evidence. EU machinery CE documentation and the correct transition treatment are required; EN 62841 can support the file but cannot be labelled mandatory.

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

rows.requirement: Outdoor Noise Emissions for Listed Equipment
rows.target_requirement: Directive 2000/14/EC is mandatory for outdoor equipment listed in its scope, which can include certain garden and construction-type power tools. It requires noise marking and conformity assessment, and some equipment categories have noise limits or notified-body involvement. This obligation is separate from general machinery safety and CE documentation.
target_standards: Directive 2000/14/EC on noise emission in the environment by equipment for use outdoors
Relevant harmonised noise measurement standards [voluntary technical route where cited]
rows.china_equivalent: China GB 3883 safety evidence usually focuses on electrical and mechanical hazards and may not include EU outdoor-noise marking, guaranteed sound-power level, category classification, or notified-body path.
china_standards: China domestic noise standards where applicable
rows.gap: Outdoor-use tools need category screening against Directive 2000/14/EC. If listed, the EU file must add the correct noise procedure, declared or guaranteed sound-power level, marking, and any required notified-body evidence.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation for listed outdoor equipment: Directive 2000/14/EC. Noise test standards are technical routes and are not standalone mandatory legal acts.
target.zh: 列名户外设备的强制法律义务：指令 2000/14/EC。噪声测试标准是技术路径，并非独立强制法律文件。
target.zht: 列名戶外設備的強制法律義務：指令 2000/14/EC。噪聲測試標準是技術路徑，並非獨立強制法律文件。

cn.en: GB 3883 safety evidence does not automatically cover EU outdoor-noise obligations.
cn.zh: GB 3883 安全证据不会自动覆盖欧盟户外噪声义务。
cn.zht: GB 3883 安全證據不會自動覆蓋歐盟戶外噪聲義務。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Potentially non-compliant for outdoor listed equipment unless Directive 2000/14/EC screening and any required noise marking, measurement, and conformity assessment are added to the EU file.

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

rows.target_requirement: Directive 2011/65/EU restricts hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment. Power tools, chargers, and electronic accessories need RoHS technical documentation and an EU declaration covering restricted substances, exemptions, and supply-chain material evidence.
rows.china_equivalent: China RoHS and GB 3883 evidence can support material and safety review, but EU RoHS requires EU-format documentation and declaration mapping to Directive 2011/65/EU.
rows.gap: The EU gap is usually material-traceability evidence rather than tool performance testing: homogeneous-material declarations, supplier controls, exemption logic, and EU declaration wording must be in place.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2011/65/EU. EN IEC 63000 is a voluntary technical documentation route.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：指令 2011/65/EU。EN IEC 63000 是自愿技术文件路径。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：指令 2011/65/EU。EN IEC 63000 是自願技術文件路徑。

cn.en: China RoHS or GB 3883 evidence does not automatically satisfy EU RoHS documentation.
cn.zh: 中国 RoHS 或 GB 3883 证据不会自动满足欧盟 RoHS 文件要求。
cn.zht: 中國 RoHS 或 GB 3883 證據不會自動滿足歐盟 RoHS 文件要求。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not EU-ready until the RoHS file supports Directive 2011/65/EU with material evidence, exemption review, and declaration coverage for the actual tool, charger, and accessories.

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

rows.target_requirement: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 applies to batteries placed on the EU market, including portable batteries used in cordless power tools. Obligations can include conformity assessment, CE marking for batteries, substance restrictions, labelling, due diligence, removability and replaceability rules, and later battery passport or performance requirements depending on battery type and date.
target_standards: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 concerning batteries and waste batteries
rows.china_equivalent: China tool files often treat the battery pack as an accessory tested with the tool under GB 3883 or under separate lithium-battery transport and safety evidence. EU Battery Regulation obligations are broader and attach to the battery placed on the EU market.
china_standards: China lithium battery safety and transport evidence where applicable
rows.gap: Cordless tools need battery-level EU compliance in addition to tool-level CE compliance. A battery pack that passes China domestic or transport tests may still need EU battery labelling, conformity assessment, documentation, removability analysis, and economic-operator obligations.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation for in-scope batteries: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. It is separate from the voluntary use of tool safety standards such as EN 62841.
target.zh: 适用电池的强制法律义务：法规（EU）2023/1542。该义务独立于 EN 62841 等工具安全标准的自愿使用。
target.zht: 適用電池的強制法律義務：法規（EU）2023/1542。該義務獨立於 EN 62841 等工具安全標準的自願使用。

cn.en: China tool and battery evidence does not automatically satisfy EU battery economic-operator and documentation duties.
cn.zh: 中国工具和电池证据不会自动满足欧盟电池经济经营者及文件义务。
cn.zht: 中國工具和電池證據不會自動滿足歐盟電池經濟經營者及文件義務。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not EU-ready for cordless tools until the battery pack is assessed under Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 as well as the tool under the applicable CE legislation.

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union
